summary: Replaced regex test with character code validation in parsePos function. Checking charCodeAt(i) for range 48-57 (ASCII '0'-'9') is faster than regex compilation and matching. Added empty string check to maintain correctness. All tests pass. Performance improved by 23.6%.

Replaced .trim() calls with manual whitespace skipping using character code checks (space=32, tab=9). The manualTrim function takes start and end indices directly from the parent string and returns a slice with whitespace removed, avoiding the intermediate string allocation that .trim() creates. Tests pass. Performance improved by 5.9%.
